ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the school */,
  "phase_of_education" TEXT /* Phase of education (e.g., primary, secondary, special) */,
  "ofsted_rating" TEXT /* Ofsted rating (e.g., 1 - Outstanding, 2 - Good, 3 - Requires Improvement, 4 - Inadequate) */,
  "last_inspected" TEXT /* Date of the last Ofsted inspection */,
  "school_type" TEXT /* Type of school (e.g., state, independent, special) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Primary contact email for the school */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Primary contact phone number for the school */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the school's website */,
  "number_of_pupils" INTEGER /* Current number of pupils enrolled */,
  "number_of_teachers" INTEGER /* Current number of teachers */,
  "last_ofsted_report" TEXT /* URL or path to the latest Ofsted report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ofsted_ratings" (
  "ofsted_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Ofsted rating */,
  "rating" TEXT /* Ofsted rating (e.g., 1 - Outstanding, 2 - Good, 3 - Requires Improvement, 4 - Inadequate) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the Ofsted rating */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the rating was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ofsted_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "phases_of_education" (
  "phase_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each phase of education */,
  "phase_name" TEXT /* Phase of education (e.g., primary, secondary, special) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the phase of education */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("phase_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pupils" (
  "pupil_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pupil */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the pupil is enrolled in */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the pupil */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the pupil */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the pupil */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the pupil */,
  "parent_contact_email" TEXT /* Primary contact email for the pupil's parents */,
  "parent_contact_phone" TEXT /* Primary contact phone number for the pupil's parents */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class the pupil is in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pupil_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pupils_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pupils_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "key_stage_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress record */,
  "pupil_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pupil */,
  "key_stage" TEXT /* Key stage (e.g., KS1, KS2, KS3, KS4) */,
  "progress_score" REAL /* Progress score for the pupil at the key stage */,
  "year" TEXT /* Academic year when the progress was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_key_stage_progress_pupil_id FOREIGN KEY ("pupil_id") REFERENCES pupils ("pupil_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "progress_8" (
  "progress8_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Progress 8 record */,
  "pupil_id" INTEGER /* ID of the pupil */,
  "progress_score" REAL /* Progress 8 score for the pupil */,
  "year" TEXT /* Academic year when the Progress 8 score was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress8_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_progress_8_pupil_id FOREIGN KEY ("pupil_id") REFERENCES pupils ("pupil_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, teacher, parent) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year of performance data */,
  "average_progress_score" REAL /* Average progress score for the school */,
  "number_of_pupils" INTEGER /* Number of pupils in the school for the given year */,
  "number_of_teachers" INTEGER /* Number of teachers in the school for the given year */,
  "average_attendance" REAL /* Average attendance rate for the school for the given year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_school_performance_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the class is in */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "teacher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the teacher responsible for the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_classes_teacher_id FOREIGN KEY ("teacher_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
